projects.title: Home Network Setup and Documentation
projects.description: Design and document your home network topology, including router configuration, subnet planning, and device inventory. Create a network diagram showing all connections.

projects.title: Network Packet Analysis with Wireshark
projects.description: Capture and analyze network traffic using Wireshark. Identify different protocols (HTTP, DNS, TCP, UDP) and document your findings with screenshots and explanations.

projects.title: Build a Virtual Network Lab
projects.description: Use VirtualBox or GNS3 to create a virtual network with multiple subnets, routers, and switches. Configure routing protocols and test connectivity between networks.

projects.title: Linux Command Line Automation
projects.description: Create a collection of bash scripts to automate common system administration tasks like backups, log rotation, and user management. Document each script with comments.

projects.title: Web Server Setup and Hardening
projects.description: Install and configure a LAMP (Linux, Apache, MySQL, PHP) stack on a Linux server. Implement security best practices including firewall rules, SSL certificates, and regular updates.

projects.title: Linux System Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Build a custom system monitoring solution using tools like Prometheus and Grafana. Monitor CPU, memory, disk usage, and network traffic with automated alerts.

projects.title: Personal Budget Tracker
projects.description: Create a command-line application to track income and expenses. Use Python to read/write data to CSV files, calculate totals, and generate monthly reports.

projects.title: Web Scraper for Job Listings
projects.description: Build a web scraper using BeautifulSoup or Scrapy to collect job postings from career websites. Store data in a database and create a simple search interface.

projects.title: Data Analysis Dashboard with Flask
projects.description: Create a web-based data analysis dashboard using Flask, Pandas, and Plotly. Allow users to upload CSV files, perform analysis, and visualize results with interactive charts.

projects.title: Library Management Database
projects.description: Design and implement a database schema for a library system with tables for books, members, and loans. Write SQL queries to manage checkouts, returns, and overdue items.

projects.title: E-commerce Sales Analysis
projects.description: Create a database with sample e-commerce data (customers, orders, products). Write complex SQL queries to analyze sales trends, customer behavior, and product performance.

projects.title: Data Warehouse with ETL Pipeline
projects.description: Build a data warehouse schema with fact and dimension tables. Implement an ETL pipeline to extract data from multiple sources, transform it, and load it for analysis.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Build a responsive portfolio website using React. Include sections for projects, skills, and contact information. Deploy to GitHub Pages or Netlify.

projects.title: Task Management Application
projects.description: Create a full-featured task manager with React. Implement features like adding/editing/deleting tasks, filtering, sorting, and local storage persistence.

projects.title: Real-time Chat Application
projects.description: Build a real-time chat app using React and WebSockets. Include features like multiple chat rooms, user authentication, message history, and online status indicators.

projects.title: Open Source Contribution
projects.description: Find a beginner-friendly open source project on GitHub. Fork the repository, fix a bug or add a feature, and submit a pull request following contribution guidelines.

projects.title: Team Collaboration Workflow
projects.description: Set up a Git workflow for a team project using branches, pull requests, and code reviews. Document the workflow and create templates for issues and PRs.

projects.title: Automated CI/CD Pipeline
projects.description: Create a complete CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions or GitLab CI. Implement automated testing, code quality checks, and deployment to production.

projects.title: IT Support Ticketing System
projects.description: Create a simple ticketing system to track and resolve IT issues. Include fields for problem description, priority, status, and resolution notes.

projects.title: System Diagnostic Tool
projects.description: Build a diagnostic tool that checks common system issues (disk space, memory usage, network connectivity). Generate reports with recommendations for fixes.

projects.title: Automated Troubleshooting Framework
projects.description: Develop a framework that automatically detects and resolves common IT issues. Include logging, alerting, and self-healing capabilities for routine problems.

projects.title: Password Strength Checker
projects.description: Create a tool that evaluates password strength based on length, complexity, and common patterns. Provide feedback and suggestions for stronger passwords.

projects.title: Vulnerability Scanner
projects.description: Build a basic vulnerability scanner that checks for common security issues like open ports, outdated software, and weak configurations. Generate detailed reports.

projects.title: Security Information Dashboard
projects.description: Create a security dashboard that aggregates data from multiple sources (logs, IDS, firewall). Visualize threats, incidents, and security metrics in real-time.

projects.title: Static Website Hosting on AWS S3
projects.description: Deploy a static website to AWS S3 with CloudFront CDN. Configure custom domain, SSL certificate, and implement basic security best practices.

projects.title: Serverless API with AWS Lambda
projects.description: Build a serverless REST API using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB. Implement CRUD operations and deploy using Infrastructure as Code (CloudFormation or Terraform).

projects.title: Multi-Cloud Architecture
projects.description: Design and implement a multi-cloud solution using AWS, Azure, or GCP. Include load balancing, auto-scaling, monitoring, and disaster recovery capabilities.

projects.title: Personal Finance Tracker
projects.description: Create an Excel workbook to track personal finances with multiple sheets for income, expenses, and budgets. Use formulas, charts, and conditional formatting.

projects.title: Sales Dashboard with Pivot Tables
projects.description: Build an interactive sales dashboard using pivot tables, slicers, and charts. Analyze sales data by region, product, and time period with dynamic filtering.

projects.title: Automated Report Generator with VBA
projects.description: Create an automated reporting system using Excel VBA. Pull data from multiple sources, perform calculations, generate charts, and export formatted reports.

projects.title: Log Analysis and Alerting System
projects.description: Set up a log collection system using tools like ELK Stack or Splunk. Create alerts for suspicious activities and generate daily security reports.

projects.title: Network Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: Deploy and configure an IDS like Snort or Suricata. Create custom rules to detect specific threats and integrate with a SIEM for centralized monitoring.

projects.title: Security Operations Center (SOC) Simulation
projects.description: Build a complete SOC environment with threat detection, incident response workflows, and automated playbooks. Include threat intelligence integration and metrics tracking.

projects.title: Incident Response Plan Documentation
projects.description: Create a comprehensive incident response plan for a small organization. Include procedures for detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned.

projects.title: Digital Forensics Investigation
projects.description: Conduct a simulated forensics investigation using tools like Autopsy or FTK. Analyze disk images, recover deleted files, and document findings in a formal report.

projects.title: Automated Incident Response Platform
projects.description: Build an automated incident response platform with playbooks for common scenarios. Include threat intelligence feeds, automated containment actions, and post-incident analysis.
